free_text: K.S., W.F.D., J.A.P. AND EXPERIMENTAL SITE
MEASUREMENT OF GAMMAS FROM THERMAL CAPTURE.
GAMS1 ENERGY RESOLUTION DELTA-E = 1.0E-5 X E X E / N
WHERE E IS IN KEV AND N IS THE DIFFRACTION ORDER.
ENERGIES CALIBRATED RELATIVE TO THE EU K X-RAY LINES.
NEUTRON CAPTURE (ARC) AND THE CONVERSION ELECTRON
SPECTRUM MEASUREMENTS APPEARING IN THE MAIN REFERENCE
HAVE NOT BEEN INCLUDED IN THIS EXFOR WORK.
.BECAUSE OF HIGH CROSS SECTIONS AND THERMAL FLUXES,
TRANSITIONS ALSO OBSERVED IN 155-EU AND 156-EU; THESE
.INTENSITIES DEDUCED BY THE INTERPOLATION OF INTENSITY
VALUES FOR SEVERAL STRONG TABULATED TRANSITIONS.
TRANSITION ENERGIES AND INTENSITIES WERE MEASURED
WITH A SI(LI) DETECTOR IN EARLIER WORK.
ENERGY AND INTENSITY FROM CONVERSION ELECTRON
